project.title: How to Built a $120K Funnel in 2 Hours With AI
project.summary: Turn missed follow-up into booked calls. For coaches, consultants, and creators selling high-value offers without a reliable follow-up system, this offer fixes slow follow-up, missed leads, and messy conversion handoffs.

metadata.headline: Turn missed follow-up into booked calls
metadata.positioning: A focused CRM automation offer for coaches, consultants, and creators selling high-value offers without a reliable follow-up system, designed to turn more demand into qualified calls.
metadata.subheadline: For coaches, consultants, and creators selling high-value offers without a reliable follow-up system, this offer fixes slow follow-up, missed leads, and messy conversion handoffs.
metadata.profitability_path: Profitability comes from packaging a repeatable service, keeping delivery lean, and upselling follow-on work

recommendation.title: How to Built a $120K Funnel in 2 Hours With AI
recommendation.summary: Turn missed follow-up into booked calls. For coaches, consultants, and creators selling high-value offers without a reliable follow-up system, this offer fixes slow follow-up, missed leads, and messy conversion handoffs
recommendation.thesis: A productized done-for-you crm automation and lead follow-up system that captures, qualifies, and nurtures inbound prospects for coaches, consultants, and creators selling high-value offers without a reliable follow-u... It is most compelling for coaches, consultants, and creators selling high-value offers without a reliable follow-up system and monetizes through productized service revenue from setup fees plus recurring retainers.
execution_plan: Interview 5-10 prospects who match this ICP: Coaches, consultants, and creators selling high-value offers without a reliable follow-up system
Package the offer as: A done-for-you CRM automation and lead follow-up system that captures, qualifies, and nurtures inbound prospects
Test a pricing structure such as: Start with a productized setup package, then add a monthly retainer for ongoing optimization and reporting
Launch with this first channel: Repurpose educational content into short-form clips, lead magnets, and direct outreach follow-up
recommendation.profitability_path: Profitability comes from packaging a repeatable service, keeping delivery lean, and upselling follow-on work
backend_handoff: Create landing page copy for this offer: A done-for-you CRM automation and lead follow-up system that captures, qualifies, and nurtures inbound prospects

Add proof sections from these points: A lot of people are the best at taxes, digital products, whatever it is, but you're the best kept secret; The one thing I learned early is like it's not the who has the best product or services, it's the who's the most seen; So, if the people don't know you, they can't flow you
Connect lead capture to support this channel: Repurpose educational content into short-form clips, lead magnets, and direct outreach follow-up

headline: Turn missed follow-up into booked calls
subheadline: For coaches, consultants, and creators selling high-value offers without a reliable follow-up system, this offer fixes slow follow-up, missed leads, and messy conversion handoffs.
positioning: A focused CRM automation offer for coaches, consultants, and creators selling high-value offers without a reliable follow-up system, designed to turn more demand into qualified calls.
core_thesis: A productized done-for-you crm automation and lead follow-up system that captures, qualifies, and nurtures inbound prospects for coaches, consultants, and creators selling high-value offers without a reliable follow-u... It is most compelling for coaches, consultants, and creators selling high-value offers without a reliable follow-up system and monetizes through productized service revenue from setup fees plus recurring retainers.
profitability_path: Profitability comes from packaging a repeatable service, keeping delivery lean, and upselling follow-on work
ideal_customer_profile: Coaches, consultants, and creators selling high-value offers without a reliable follow-up system
who_its_for: This is built for coaches, consultants, and creators selling high-value offers without a reliable follow-up system who want a simpler way to turn attention into qualified pipeline.
offer: A done-for-you CRM automation and lead follow-up system that captures, qualifies, and nurtures inbound prospects
pricing_model: Start with a productized setup package, then add a monthly retainer for ongoing optimization and reporting
pricing_blurb: Start with a setup package and add a monthly optimization retainer once the funnel is converting.
acquisition_channel: Repurpose educational content into short-form clips, lead magnets, and direct outreach follow-up
proof_points: A lot of people are the best at taxes, digital products, whatever it is, but you're the best kept secret
The one thing I learned early is like it's not the who has the best product or services, it's the who's the most seen
So, if the people don't know you, they can't flow you
customer_pain_points: Leads are arriving, but follow-up is slow or inconsistent
Prospects fall through the cracks because the CRM is underused or disorganized
Too much manual work is being handled by the owner or a small team
revenue_model: Productized service revenue from setup fees plus recurring retainers
offer_outcomes: Capture inbound leads the moment they arrive.
Automate follow-up so qualified prospects do not go cold.
Centralize pipeline visibility inside one simple CRM workflow.
Turn more demand into booked calls and sales conversations.
cta_support: Use short-form content, lead magnets, and direct outreach to drive interest, then route responses into a simple audit, demo, or booking flow.
page_promises: Primary landing page and conversion CTA
Explain the service or product clearly
Show process and reduce buyer friction
Capture leads and schedule next step
